meta.title: Really Long Context LLMs - 200k input tokens
meta.description:
Models and Scripts all at Trelis.com
~~~
Models:
- "Base" Yi 34B 200k Model: https://huggingface.co/01-ai/Yi-34B
- "Chat" Version: https://huggingface.co/Trelis/Yi-34B-200K-Llamafied-chat-SFT
- "Function-calling" Version: https://huggingface.co/Trelis/Yi-34B-200K-Llamafied-chat-SFT-function-calling-v2 

Inference:
- Inference Guide/Scripts: https://trelis.com/enterprise-server-api-and-inference-guide/
- One click Runpod template: https://runpod.io/gsc?template=g3oeoerfm3&ref=jmfkcdio
- Runpod affiliate link (helps support the channel): http://tinyurl.com/ym3sph3c

Chapters:
0:00 Really long context length large language models
00:10 Video overview
1:21 Yi 200k context model
2:55 Which long context models are actually good?
4:25 Base model vs Chat fine-tuned Yi model
9:16 Passkey Retrieval on Yi 6B
12:36 Passkey retrieval for Claude
14:19 Yi 34B performance at 107k context
16:38 Inferencing Yi models with Runpod
22:10 Yi Function-calling models
22:26 Long Context Model Resources
23:53 Video Summary
